name: agricultural_policy_near_miss_event_marrowbridge_tru_loy
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Agricultural Policy, the situation tagged internally around agricultural policy near miss event marrowbridge tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both truth and loyalty; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Nadia Navarro
agents.identity: I am Nadia Navarro, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Agricultural Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Harper Kaur
agents.identity: I am Harper Kaur, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Agricultural Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on loyalty.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on loyalty for immediate traction on truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Nadia Navarro must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Nadia Navarro do?
